**Unit** (e.g. `a1.1/unit-01-greetings`):

**File**: lesson.json / exercises.json / audio

**What is wrong** (quote the French if you can):

**The correct version**:

**Are you a native / fluent French speaker?** yes / no

> Native-speaker corrections are especially valuable — they're how units get
> marked `approved`. Thank you!
